CREATE TABLE test_data (value BFloat16, weight Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (value BFloat16, weight Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.75, weight)(value) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT value, weight FROM additional_data);
SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.5, weight)(value) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data WHERE weight > 0.5);
SELECT t1.value, quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.5, t1.weight)(t2.value) AS weighted_quantile FROM test_data AS t1 JOIN additional_data AS t2 ON t1.weight = t2.weight GROUP BY t1.value;
SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.5, weight)(value) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data WHERE weight != 0) ORDER BY value DESC;
SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.95, weight)(value) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM test_data WHERE weight < 1.0) GROUP BY weight;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data) AS total_count SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.5, weight)(value) FROM test_data HAVING total_count > 0;
